precheckFindings.conclusion: 高频非必填字段已按项目策略省略，不应仅因这些字段为空或未发送而输出审核问题。
单元过程或黑箱类型的 LCI 方法字段为不适用或空值，按当前口径可接受。
功能单位或基准流中的 referenceToReferenceFlow 指向输入/输出交换的内部ID，不是投影表显示序号；当前已匹配内部ID 0 的基准流，不应按显示序号判定基准流错位。
已识别基准输出流及结果量；定量产品或过程属性缺失可作为建议补充，但在基准输出和数量已明确时不应单独作为必改或不通过理由。
输入/输出已读取：输入 10 条，输出 3 条。

categories.name: 过程信息

处理、标准、路线.zh: 深度处理法，中型水厂，加权平均
处理、标准、路线.en: Advanced Treatment Process, Medium Water Treatment Plant, Weighted Average

数据集一般性说明.zh: 本数据集反映上海市 3 座采用深度处理工艺的中型自来水厂在 2021 年的运行状况。所有前景数据按各厂年制水量进行加权平均，用于表征上海地区中型深度处理自来水厂的典型技术与环境绩效水平。为保护企业隐私，单厂原始数据不对外公开，本数据集不对应任何单一具体水厂。
数据集一般性说明.en: This dataset reflects the operational status of three medium-scale water treatment plants in Shanghai employing advanced treatment processes during 2021. All forward-looking data are weighted averages based on each plant's annual water production volume, representing typical technical and environmental performance levels for medium-scale advanced treatment plants in the Shanghai region. To protect corporate privacy, raw data from individual plants are not publicly disclosed; this dataset does not correspond to any single specific water treatment facility.

分类.name: Water supply; sewerage, waste management and remediation activities

技术描述及背景系统.zh: 本数据集代表上海市 3 座采用深度处理工艺的中型自来水厂在 2021 年、按年制水量加权后的平均技术水平。厂内处理工艺在功能上可概括为：取水与提升 → 净水处理 → 深度处理 → 消毒及清水储存 → 出厂供水。
技术描述及背景系统.en: This dataset represents the average technical performance of three medium water treatment plants in Shanghai employing advanced treatment processes in 2021, weighted by annual water production volume. The functional sequence of treatment processes within the plants can be summarized as: water intake and pumping → primary treatment → advanced treatment → disinfection and clear water storage → final water supply.

description.zh: 上海市自来水厂实地调研数据
description.en: Field Research Data from multiple water supply plants in Shanghai

description.zh: 上海市自来水厂实地调研数据
description.en: Field Research Data from multiple water supply plants in Shanghai

数据切断和完整性原则.zh: 本数据集在“自来水厂取水及提升设施入口 → 厂内净水处理与深度处理 → 清水储存准备运输至出厂供水”的边界内，尽可能完整统计了原水与出厂水水量、电力消耗以及主要水处理药剂的用量，同时考虑污泥等主要物料的产生，并按 3家中型深度处理水厂的年制水量进行加权。由于监测与资料获取条件的限制，未单独计入办公及生活用能、未监测的微量污染物排放等对质量与能量平衡贡献极小的项目，其环境影响相对于主要物料和能源可认为可以忽略。上游水库取水与预处理、水厂基础设施（土建及设备）的建设、扩建与拆除过程，以及厂外输配管网和终端用水过程均不在本数据集系统边界之内。
数据切断和完整性原则.en: This dataset comprehensively tracks raw water and treated water volumes, electricity consumption, and key chemical dosages within the boundary spanning “water intake and pumping facilities → on-site purification and advanced treatment → treated water storage prior to distribution,” while accounting for major material outputs like sludge. Data is weighted based on the annual production capacity of three medium-scale advanced treatment plants. Due to limitations in monitoring and data acquisition, items contributing minimally to mass and energy balances—such as energy consumption for office and domestic use, and emissions of unmonitored trace pollutants—are excluded. Their environmental impact is considered negligible relative to primary materials and energy. The following processes are excluded from the system boundary of this dataset: upstream reservoir water intake and pretreatment; construction, expansion, and demolition of plant infrastructure (civil works and equipment); external transmission and distribution pipelines; and end-use processes.

参数与边界备注.zh: 目前尚无针对自来水厂规模划分的统一专门标准。本数据集在对案例水厂规模进行表述时，参考《城市给水工程规划规范》（GB 50282-2016）中表 7.0.6 关于按给水规模划分水厂用地规模的分级方法，将日供水能力 Q ≤ 10 万 m³/d 的水厂划分为小型水厂，10 万 < Q ≤ 30 万 m³/d 的划分为中型水厂，Q > 30 万 m³/d 的划分为大型水厂，特此说明。
参数与边界备注.en: At present, there is no unified dedicated standard for classifying the scale of drinking water treatment plants. In this dataset, when describing the size of the case plants, we refer to Table 7.0.6 of the Code for urban water supply engineering planning (GB 50282-2016), which classifies land-use scales of water treatment plants according to their water supply capacity. Accordingly, plants with a daily water supply capacity Q ≤ 100,000 m³/d are defined as small-scale, those with 100,000 < Q ≤ 300,000 m³/d as medium-scale, and those with Q > 300,000 m³/d as large-scale. This clarification is provided here for reference.

categories.name: 管理信息

预期应用.zh: 本数据集预期用于以城市自来水厂为核心的供水系统生命周期评价中，表示自来水厂内从取水及提升设施入口到出厂自来水阶段的净水处理（包含深度处理）的过程，可与上游“水库取水与预处理”数据集及下游输配水过程组合使用。适用于采用常规处理并叠加深度处理工艺、规模相近的中型地表水自来水厂的情形，不适用于仅采用常规处理的水厂、地下水源水厂，以及工业特种用水、再生水等其他类型供水系统。
预期应用.en: This dataset is intended for use in the life cycle assessment of water supply systems centered on municipal water treatment plants. It represents the water purification process (including advanced treatment) within the plant, from the intake and pumping facility inlet to the point of finished water discharge. It can be combined with upstream “reservoir intake and pretreatment” datasets and downstream water distribution processes. It is applicable to medium-scale surface water treatment plants of comparable size employing conventional treatment with additional advanced treatment processes. This dataset is not suitable for plants using conventional treatment alone, groundwater source plants, or other water supply systems such as industrial specialty water or reclaimed water.
